testcase.name: test_send_personal_sms_returns_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_personal_sms.py:90: in test_send_personal_sms_returns_success assert send_response.status_code == 200, f"Send failed: {send_response.text}" E AssertionError: Send failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","conversation_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"content":"Test personal SMS message - sent from user device","channel":"sms_personal"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_personal_sms_message_logged_in_db
testcase.failure: tests/test_personal_sms.py:121: in test_personal_sms_message_logged_in_db assert send_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regular_sms_channel_still_works
testcase.failure: tests/test_personal_sms.py:161: in test_regular_sms_channel_still_works assert send_response.status_code == 200, f"Regular SMS send failed: {send_response.text}" E AssertionError: Regular SMS send failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","conversation_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"content":"Test regular SMS message","channel":"sms"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_email_channel_no_regression
testcase.failure: tests/test_personal_sms.py:190: in test_email_channel_no_regression assert send_response.status_code == 200, f"Email send request failed: {send_response.text}" E AssertionError: Email send request failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","conversation_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"content":"Test email message","channel":"email"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
